title: B1 Listening Part 1 - Test 49
instructions: For each question, listen to the short recording and choose the correct picture: A, B or C.

questions.context: You hear two people talking about a lost calculator.
questions.audio_script: Man: Did you find your calculator? You sounded worried this morning. || Woman: Yes, but not where I expected. I went back to the maths room, because I remembered using it in the test. || Man: And did you check the home desk? You were there later. || Woman: I did, but it was not there. Then my classmate called and said [1]my calculator was on the science shelf[/1]. I must have left it there without thinking. || Man: Good. You would need it today. || Woman: Exactly, so I will collect it soon.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Did you find your calculator? You sounded worried this morning.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Yes, but not where I expected. I went back to the maths room, because I remembered using it in the test.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: And did you check the home desk? You were there later.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: I did, but it was not there. Then my classmate called and said my calculator was on the science shelf. I must have left it there without thinking.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Good. You would need it today.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Exactly, so I will collect it soon.

questions.question: Where is the calculator?

A.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, calculator on a maths desk, no text or labels, flat educational drawing, black and white line art, minimal details, clean white background.

B.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, calculator on a desk at home, no text or labels, flat educational drawing, black and white line art, minimal details, clean white background.

C.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, calculator on a science classroom shelf, no text or labels, flat educational drawing, black and white line art, minimal details, clean white background.

questions.explanation: The speaker says my calculator was on the science shelf.

questions.context: You hear two friends making plans for the afternoon.
questions.audio_script: Woman: Are we still going to go to dance class this afternoon? I was looking forward to it. || Man: I don't think so. The teacher is ill, so that plan will not work. || Woman: We could play basketball instead. || Man: I checked, but the sports hall is busy. My cousin suggested another idea, and [1]we are joining a quiz evening after school[/1]. || Woman: That sounds fine. What time shall we meet? || Man: Let's meet at four outside the station, and we can go together. || Man: That should make the rest of the day much easier.

dialogue.speaker: woman

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Let's meet at four outside the station, and we can go together.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: That should make the rest of the day much easier.

questions.context: You hear two students talking about the drama practice.
questions.audio_script: Woman: What do we need to take for the drama practice tomorrow? I don't want to carry too much. || Man: The teacher said we do not need to bring a costume, because they have enough for everybody. || Woman: What about trainers? || Man: No, not this time. The important thing is this: [1]bring a mirror because we are trying the first scene in costume[/1]. || Woman: Thanks. I will put it in my bag tonight. || Man: Good idea. We have to leave early, so do not forget it.

questions.context: You hear two people choosing food in a café.
questions.audio_script: Man: Have you decided what to get for lunch? The queue is moving quickly. || Woman: I first thought about apple cake, but I want something savoury. || Man: The egg sandwich looks good too. || Woman: Maybe, but the bread looks dry. I think [1]I will have the vegetable quiche because it smells lovely[/1]. || Man: Good choice. I will order after you. || Woman: Great, then we can find a table near the window before it gets busy. || Woman: That should make the rest of the day much easier. || Woman: Please remember this, because there may not be another message.

questions.context: You hear a school announcement about the art club.
questions.audio_script: Speaker: This is a message for students joining the art club today. Please do not go to the art room, because the sinks are broken. Some students may wait by the library, but it is quiet study time. The teacher has changed the room for today only. [1]Everyone should go straight to the design room after lunch[/1]. Please arrive on time, because the activity will begin as soon as the register is checked. You do not need to bring any extra equipment.

dialogue.speaker: speaker
dialogue.text: This is a message for students joining the art club today. Please do not go to the art room, because the sinks are broken. Some students may wait by the library, but it is quiet study time. The teacher has changed the room for today only. Everyone should go straight to the design room after lunch. Please arrive on time, because the activity will begin as soon as the register is checked. You do not need to bring any extra equipment.

questions.context: You hear two people talking about travelling to the swimming pool.
questions.audio_script: Girl: How are you getting to the swimming pool tomorrow? I thought you were going to walk. || Boy: I was, but I have too much to carry. || Girl: Could you use going by bike instead? || Boy: I checked, but the tyre needs air. [1]I am going to take the car because Mum can drop me there before work[/1]. || Girl: That sounds sensible. I will meet you near the entrance when you arrive. || Boy: Great. I will send a message if I am late. || Boy: That should make the rest of the day much easier.

questions.context: You hear two people talking about work in a clothes shop.
questions.audio_script: Boy: What are you doing at the clothes shop this afternoon? I thought the manager asked you to fold jumpers. || Girl: Not now, because someone finished that already. || Boy: So will you stand by the changing rooms? || Girl: No, they are closed today. The manager said [1]my job today is to attach tags to new coats[/1]. || Boy: That sounds clear enough. || Girl: Yes, and it should not take too long if the shop stays quiet. I can help you afterwards. || Girl: That should make the rest of the day much easier.
